sentences.english: The best concert I ever went to was a rock concert in a small club.
sentences.korean: 최고의 콘서트는 작은 클럽에서의 록 콘서트였어요.

sentences.english: I went to a K-pop concert in Seoul and the fans were amazing.
sentences.korean: 서울에서 K-pop 콘서트에 갔는데 팬들이 놀라웠어요.

sentences.english: Everyone knew every word of every song.
sentences.korean: 모두가 모든 노래의 모든 가사를 알았어요.

sentences.english: I prefer outdoor music festivals because the atmosphere is incredible, with thousands of people all singing together.
sentences.korean: 야외 음악 축제를 선호해요. 분위기가 엄청나거든요. 수천 명이 함께 노래해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
